_doc: Faithful replay: UiPath.Slack.IntegrationService.Activities.SendMessage faults AFTER the connection resolved, with UiPath.BAF.Infrastructure.Exceptions.BusinessActivityExecutionException carrying the Slack Web API error (ProviderMessage {"ok":false,"error":"channel_not_found"}). The agent must read the Slack error code, not stop at the HTTP 400. Captured from a real Orchestrator job; PII scrubbed. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the BusinessActivityExecutionException and the Slack ProviderMessage error code (channel_not_found).
